EventText.NameOfScene: What were you doing with that wall?
theScene: Oh, we're gonna paint it while we watch the area.

Yeah, gotta find something to do to kill time while waiting for adventurers to shake down, y'know. And graffitiing's something of a tradition among Livewires, so we practice whenever we get the opportunity, in order to keep our skills sharp, express ourselves, and put our mark on the city.

As if to exemplify, the second voltlin takes one of the cans at her sides and shakes it with a practiced motion before spraying a puff of its colored contents across a bare spot of the wall, covering it in a splattering spray of paint with a distinctive hiss.

... Don't expect us to pull off some masterpiece at the drop of a hat, though. This deep into the alleys, most of the tags you'll see are practice material, and we don't typically use stencils or coordinate with each other or anything, so it's honestly kind of a mess.
I think it's got charm too, though! The Boss got such a great deal letting us get away with legal vandalism just for doin' our job.♪

Yeah, some dusty traditionalists at the City Council weren't too keen on the idea, but she managed to make it pass with some muscling, and also by convincing them that it's part of the future of Lucidian culture.

All three nod in approval and dreamily sigh in appreciation, their deep respect and reverence for The Boss plain to see. And with that, it seems like it's all they're going to say on the subject, but as the spray-painting one returns her can back to its holster, she looks to you and adds as an afterthought.

Oh, and also, in case you're concerned, don't worry about any of us spraying you in the face or something with paint. That'd just be rude, unsexy, and, like, {i}unartistic{/i}. No Livewire would stoop to that..
